LanguageData.MGAutoSell.RuleInvalid: This rule is invalid because the minimum exceeds the maximum.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Title: Find / Trade
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.InvalidRange: This rule is invalid because you are trying to have at least {0}, and at most {1}.\nImport must be larger than Export.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.InvalidBuy: This rule is invalid because you are trying to import {0}.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Basically: This Maintain rule is basically an {0} rule, since your {1} amount is not greater than 0.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.BenchmarkDisabled: Load a save/map to enable benchmarking.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.scanEveryStackToolti: Scan every stack of items on the map instead of just the first Thing per trade row.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.rememberManualTradeT: When manually trading, mark them so that they won't be automatically traded with again later.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.showAllMatchingItems: Display all items that match the trade rules, not just selling.\n\nA rule's list is regenerated when the rule changes.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.showQuantityInsteadO: Display the quantity of items instead of their mode labels.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.colorRuleCountsOnWor: Color Import/Export Boxes Based on Quantity
Color the Import/Export boxes based on whether the rule will do something on the next trade.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.showMinMaxLabelWhere: When showing quantity instead of label, show the min/max quantity as the label if the is aggregated by ThingDef, and Min is not equal to Max, and if there's space.
